item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-016","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer directly reframes the choice around whether retention is sufficient, using the leaky-bucket logic: growth before retention wastes acquisition and attention.
